response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, including AI-agent infrastructure work at Google and cloud-based systems at Meta, with relevant skills in TypeScript, AWS, and agentic workflows — but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI solutions, vector databases, RAG architectures, or direct enterprise customer-facing technical leadership, and his resume contains implausible employment dates and lacks formal AI/ML specialization.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at Google
Proven cloud and full-stack development with TypeScript/Node.js/AWS
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentoring background
concerns: Employment timeline includes impossible overlap (Google start date is future-dated)
No explicit evidence of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization experience
Lacks demonstrable enterprise customer-facing technical leadership or consulting role history
